name: IRSF-006: AED Polypharmacy Effect on Functional Impairment (SCCS)
description: Self-Controlled Case Series examining whether transition to 3+ concurrent anticonvulsants (AED polypharmacy, cohort 208) is associated with severe functional impairment (CSS Total >= 30, cohort 212). SCCS uses each patient as their own control, eliminating confounding by genotype, sex, and baseline severity. Two risk windows: on-treatment and 90-day post-treatment. 180-day naive period excludes early observation. Event-dependent observation accounts for death censoring. This is the first within-patient AED safety study in Rett syndrome.
